Program_Description: The MCAH Program supports the health and well-being of women, infants, children, and adolescents in Sierra County.

The Women, Infants and Children (WIC) Supplemental Nutrition Program is a federally-funded health and nutrition program for women who are pregnant, breastfeeding, or just had a baby, and children under 5 years old.
Target_Population: Low-income pregnant, postpartum, and breastfeeding women; infants and children under 5 years old.
Eligibility_Requirements: Families with low to medium income; working families may qualify.
Application_Process: Please call Sierra County WIC at 530-993-6700 to get information and make an appointment.

Program_Description: Family PACT is California's family planning program for low-income residents, providing comprehensive reproductive health services at no cost to eligible individuals.
Eligibility_Requirements: California Resident, family income at or below 200% of the Federal Poverty Level, no other health insurance covering family planning, medically eligible for family planning services.
Application_Process: Enrollment is completed on-site at the time of your visit.
